sections.content: Sales Channels helps the penetration of the products and increase the market reach. However on the flip side, managing the sales channel could be an upheaval task. Motivating and managing the sales channel partners, requires special skills and orientation. ‘Sales Channel Management’ is a rigorous two days workshop, that empowers with skills and framework to gain maximum output through the channels. It employs smart working techniques to build long term profitable relationship across all the channels.

content: Understand the nuances of the channel partner mechanism and its importance
Build rapport and trust with channel partners
Establish the business metrics and drive it through
Use structured review mechanisms to keep track
Motivate and recognise the channel partners for better growth
Build long term relationships with the channel partners
